problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
mechanism: Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure
hypothesis: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Piezoelectric. Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure directly addresses this.
